verification_queries: Exact selected story verification query after scoring
discovery_sequence: Start with broad discovery queries across news, reputation, investor, customer, trade, and analyst contexts.
Score all candidate stories before reduction using the weighted influence model.
Run targeted verification only after scoring to confirm dates, source wording, URLs, and counter-evidence.
influence_ranking.ranking_method: Score candidate stories from 1 to 100 and order the final set by score descending.
search_queries: Example Brand news last six months
Example Brand reputation reviews controversy trust
Example Brand investor trade press growth partnership
Example Brand customer complaints service quality
influence_ranking.confidence_rationale: Explain why the final ranking is reliable enough to use.
limitations: Disclose source coverage gaps or unresolved ambiguity.

requests.why: Primary evidence for keyword demand, ranking gaps, and SEO opportunity sizing.

competitor_discovery.why_passed: Competitor set was gathered from current web evidence using Tavily.

recent_news.why_passed: Recent stories were gathered from current web evidence using Tavily.

query_summary: Example Brand reviews controversy trust public web
reputation_public_web.why_passed: Public-web trust signals were gathered using Jina as the current-web fallback.

query_summary: site:example.com Example Brand solutions case study
source_gathering.why_passed: Owned and third-party sources were gathered and mapped using Tavily with Jina available as fallback.

notes: Live-assisted research summary created in Codex from current-web tools and imported into newbizintel.
Use Composio, not Rube, for SEMrush access.
Use Jina as the backup current-web layer when Tavily or SEMrush is blocked or quota-limited.
